en: Everyone who believes that Jesus is the Christ has been born of God, and everyone who loves the Father loves whomever has been born of him.
zh: 凡信耶穌是基督的，都是從 神生的，凡愛那生他的，也必愛那從他而生的。

en: By this we know that we love the children of God, when we love God and obey his commandments.
zh: 我們若愛 神，並且遵行他的命令，就知道我們是愛 神的兒女了。

en: For this is the love of God, that we keep his commandments. And his commandments are not burdensome.
zh: 我們遵守 神的命令，就是愛他了；而且他的命令是不難遵守的，

en: For everyone who has been born of God overcomes the world. And this is the victory that has overcome the world- our faith.
zh: 因為凡從 神生的就勝過世界。使我們勝過世界的，就是我們的信心。

en: Who is it that overcomes the world except the one who believes that Jesus is the Son of God?
zh: 勝過世界的是誰呢？不就是那信耶穌是 神的兒子的嗎？

en: This is he who came by water and blood- Jesus Christ; not by the water only but by the water and the blood. And the Spirit is the one who testifies, because the Spirit is the truth.
zh: 那藉著水和血來的就是耶穌基督，不是單用水，而是用水又用血；作見證的是聖靈，因為聖靈就是真理。

en: For there are three that testify:
zh: 原來作見證的有三樣，

en: the Spirit and the water and the blood; and these three agree.
zh: 就是聖靈、水和血，這三樣是一致的。

en: If we receive the testimony of men, the testimony of God is greater, for this is the testimony of God that he has borne concerning his Son.
zh: 我們若接受人的見證， 神的見證就更強而有力了，因為這是 神為他的兒子作的見證。

en: Whoever believes in the Son of God has the testimony in himself. Whoever does not believe God has made him a liar, because he has not believed in the testimony that God has borne concerning his Son.
zh: 信 神的兒子的，就有這見證在他心裡；不信 神的，就是把 神當作說謊的，因為他不信 神為他兒子所作的見證。

en: And this is the testimony, that God gave us eternal life, and this life is in his Son.
zh: 這見證就是 神已經把永遠的生命賜給我們，這生命是在他兒子裡面的。

en: Whoever has the Son has life; whoever does not have the Son of God does not have life.
zh: 凡有 神兒子的，就有生命；沒有 神兒子的，就沒有生命。

en: I write these things to you who believe in the name of the Son of God that you may know that you have eternal life.
zh: 我把這些事寫給你們信 神的兒子之名的人，是要你們知道自己有永生。

en: And this is the confidence that we have toward him, that if we ask anything according to his will he hears us.
zh: 如果我們照著 神的旨意祈求，他必聽我們；這就是我們對 神所存的坦然無懼的心。

en: And if we know that he hears us in whatever we ask, we know that we have the requests that we have asked of him.
zh: 既然我們知道他聽我們的祈求，我們就知道，我們無論求甚麼，他必賜給我們。

en: If anyone sees his brother committing a sin not leading to death, he shall ask, and God will give him life- to those who commit sins that do not lead to death. There is sin that leads to death; I do not say that one should pray for that.
zh: 如果有人看見弟兄犯了不至於死的罪，他就要祈求， 神必因他的緣故，把生命賜給那些犯了不至於死的罪的人；有至於死的罪，我不說他應當為那罪祈求。

en: All wrongdoing is sin, but there is sin that does not lead to death.
zh: 一切不義都是罪，但也有不至於死的罪。

en: We know that everyone who has been born of God does not keep on sinning, but he who was born of God protects him, and the evil one does not touch him.
zh: 我們知道凡從 神生的就不犯罪，而且從 神生的那一位也必保守他，連那惡者也不能碰他。

en: We know that we are from God, and the whole world lies in the power of the evil one.
zh: 我們知道我們是屬於 神的，而整個世界是伏在那惡者手下。

en: And we know that the Son of God has come and has given us understanding, so that we may know him who is true; and we are in him who is true, in his Son Jesus Christ. He is the true God and eternal life.
zh: 我們知道 神的兒子已經來了，並且賜給我們悟性，使我們能認識那位真實者。我們也在那位真實者裡面，就是在他兒子耶穌基督裡面。這一位就是真神，也是永遠的生命。

en: Little children, keep yourselves from idols.
zh: 孩子們，你們要保守自己遠離偶像。
